work_unit: AS-CP-M02 backfill derived_direction_shifts field in audit history entries
situation: audit-cycle-state.json history array has 2 entries (audit-2026-07-01-001, audit-2026-07-01-002) missing the derived_direction_shifts field added to schema in later audits. Field absence breaks uniform aggregation and was flagged as AS-CP-M02 in audit-2026-07-02-006.
action: Backfilled derived_direction_shifts=0 for both history entries via direct edit of audit-cycle-state.json. Value 0 is correct: both audits predate direction-shift tracking and neither produced direction-shift fixes (verified by inspecting their derived_route_fixes counts and lack of direction-shift mentions in corresponding audit reports).
outcome_evidence: Commit d732247 pushed to auto/opt-audit-1782986990. python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('.claude/audit-cycle-state.json')); missing=[h['audit_id'] for h in d['history'] if 'derived_direction_shifts' not in h]; print(len(missing))" now returns 0 (was 2 before fix). Route-fix reused existing worktree per opt-worktree.sh direction_kind logic (no public-interfaces.txt touch).
next_suggestion: 派生 AS-CP-M03 (scout-scan.py 加 audit report integrity check) 或 AS-CP-L03 (lost_count 字段文档化/移除)。AS-CP-H01/L01/L02 已静默修复，下轮应批量标 rejected。
